commands.review_summary:
The PR deletes the completed `packageLegacyZipHashBackfill` Convex module, its tests, and generated API type references.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a cleanup PR removing a completed one-off backfill. The relevant evidence is the PR body's production completion and read-only verification result, not a bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A collaborator-authored cleanup that removes a production maintenance rerun path should be handled by maintainer confirmation rather than automated repair.

target.title: chore: remove legacy package ZIP backfill
target.body:
## Summary

- remove the completed one-off legacy package ZIP hash backfill action
- remove its dedicated tests and generated Convex API reference
- preserve the permanent legacy ZIP hash and canonical npm artifact hash behavior

## Migration result

- production backfill completed for 3,926 npm-pack releases
- final read-only verification: 3,926 matched, 0 would patch, 0 errors

## Validation

- `bunx vitest run convex/lib/packageArtifacts.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/vt.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts` (555 passed)
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit` (3,161 passed, 1 skipped)
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT=prod:wry-manatee-359 bunx convex deploy --dry-run --typecheck enable --codegen enable`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
